payloads.text:
I see. The `outline_review_v1.md` (13:30) is the latest review, written after the v2 outline (13:32... wait, v2 outline is 13:32 but review is 13:30). That's odd - the review was written before the v2 outline? Let me re-check.

Actually looking at timestamps:
- `outline_review_r1.md` (13:25) - first review round
- `review_stage3.5_r1.md` (13:28) - R1 review with REVISE
- v2 outline created at 13:32 - architect revised
- `outline_review_v1.md` (13:30) - this is at 13:30, before v2 at 13:32

Hmm, the timeline doesn't quite add up. The review at 13:30 is before the v2 outline at 13:32. But the webhook just came in at 13:30 saying ACCEPT.

Wait - the review file `outline_review_v1.md` at 13:30 might have been the review of v1 that said ACCEPT initially. Then `review_stage3.5_r1.md` at 13:28 said REVISE. But 13:30 > 13:28, so...

Let me just check the R1 review to understand the flow.
